audit_notes: Sampled 95+ products visually. Most products follow standard front+back pattern correctly. Confirmed problems are flagged. Single-image kid sets and jacket products are typically set-with-shorts photos (acceptable). Euro 2024 national team products often use jersey-only as image 0 and shorts-only as image 1 (problematic - shorts alone = closeup-detail).
